phases.name: Always-on standby (battery + LPC_VCC + RTC)

triggers_next.rationale: VOUT enable on U2 comes from R3 divider (edge: R3 --enables--> U2), latching the charger/booster on once battery VIN is present.

evidence: designer note p3 U14: 'Standby always-on 3V3 power rail'
designer note p4 U5: 'Powered by main batteries in standby'
LPC_VCC produced by U14 and consumed by U18 (LPC MCU) — enables it to run before any EN is asserted

phases.name: Charger/booster + inrush limiter bring up VIN stage

triggers_next.rationale: Once VIN/LPC_VCC are stable, the LPC MCU (U18) decides to assert the main-rail EN lines — per designer note p3 U7 'enabled by LPC'.

evidence: designer note p2 Q3: 'Inrush Current Limiter by Zoe'

phases.name: LPC asserts main +5V and +3V3 rails

triggers_next.rationale: LPC next asserts the SoC core rails once +5V/+3V3 are up (U19 and U13 are both fed from +5V).
LPC drives 1V2_PWR_EN into U13 per edge U18 --> 1V2_PWR_EN --> U13.

evidence: designer note p3 U7: 'Main system power converters, enabled by LPC'

phases.name: LPC brings up +1V5 and +1V2 SoC rails

triggers_next.rationale: With core rails up, LPC asserts AUX_PWR_EN to U27 (designer note p6 U27 '3V3 Aux Power Switch').
LPC then gates USB power via U24 (edge USB_PWR_EN --enables--> U24).

evidence: U19 and U13 are both powered from +5V (consumers list), so they must come after phase 2

phases.name: LPC enables AUX 3V3 switch and USB power

triggers_next.rationale: LPC gates PCIe power last (edge PCIE1_PWR_EN --enables--> U20), after the SoC has booted and requested it.

evidence: designer note p6 U27: '3V3 Aux Power Switch'
U1 (i.MX SoC) drives PMIC_ON_REQ / IMX_FBOOT / DSI lanes — comes up once core + aux rails are stable

phases.name: On-demand peripherals (USB hub, HDMI, audio codec, DP)
evidence: designer note p5 U9: 'TODO: possibly control by LPC' — USB hub brought up on demand
U3 audio codec driven by DAC_DOUT/DAC_TXFS from SoC (SoC driver brings it up)
U10 eDP bridge driven by U1 DSI lanes (phase 12 edges)

ambiguities: Exact ordering between Q3 inrush limiter, U2 charger turn-on, and VOUT stabilization is not fully specified by the notes — treated as a single 'VIN stage' phase.
Whether U18 (LPC MCU) asserts 5V_PWR_EN before or concurrently with 3V3_PWR_EN is not stated; grouped together in phase 2.
U1 (i.MX SoC) entry point is approximate — it boots from 1V1_HBSU/3V3_HBSU which are marked 'external'; placed in phase 4 when core + aux rails are all stable.
U9 USB hub sequencing is explicitly unresolved per designer note p5 'TODO: possibly control by LPC'.
